skills.name: Immolation
skills.description: Sets enemies on fire, inflicting Fire-property damage. Your own body also catches on fire and reduces your HP but a minimum critical chance of 20% will be applied to attacks by Zealot. Your character will not become incapable of combat from this damage.
skills.effect_text:
Reduces 1% HP every 0.5 seconds
SkillFactor % Fire damage every 0.5 seconds
Fire Property Resistance: + CaptionRatio
Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Beady Eyed
skills.description: Move to the back of enemies in an instant.

skills.name: Fanaticism
skills.effect_text:
Duration: 30 minutes
Increases Zealot's damage by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Fanatic Illusion
skills.description: Envelop your body in lightning, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Continuously consumes SP, and cancels if SP runs out. Increases your Lightning-property resistance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
Target: CaptionRatio3
Duration: 15 seconds
Consumes CaptionRatio SP per second
Lightning Property Resistance: + CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Blind Faith
skills.description: Consume 5% of your maximum SP and attack by giving a powerful shock in the nearby area.

skills.name: Emphatic Trust
skills.description: Applies a debuff to nearby enemies that causes them to take [Physical]-[Holy]-[Strike] property damage when they are attacked.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Maximum 10 attacks
Targets: CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Immolation: Fire Property Attack
attributes.description:
* Increases Fire property attack by 100 per attribute level when using Immolation

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Immolation: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Immolation] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fanatic Illusion: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fanatic Illusion] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Immolation: Fire Property Resistance
attributes.description:
* Increases Fire property resistance by 300 per attribute level when using Immolation

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Fanatic Illusion: Increase Accuracy
attributes.description:
* Increases accuracy of [Fanatic Illusion] by 10% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Beady Eyed: Sudden Attack
attributes.description:
* Increase in minimum critical chance by 15% when skill [Beady Eyed] is successfully used.

Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Immolation: Melt Armor
attributes.description:
* Using [Immolation] reduces the physical, magic Defense values of your armor and your target's by 1% per attribute level

* If the target is a monster, it reduces its basic physical, magic defense

* Duration 5 sec

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Fanaticism: Martyr
attributes.description:
* If you become incapable of combat during [Fanaticism], your skills' cooldown is reset and you survive with 1 HP for 2 seconds per attribute level

* After that duration, you become incapable of combat

* Skill duration reduced by half under PvP environments

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Emphatic Trust: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Emphatic Trust] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Martyr: Holy Sacrifice
attributes.description:
* Upon dying from [Fanaticism: Martyr], nearby allies recover 50% of their maximum HP and they are granted the [Price of Sacrifice] buff for 60 seconds which increases their damage

* The [Price of Sacrifice] buff stacks up to 3 times, increasing damage by 10% for each stack

attributes.name: [Arts] Immolation: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Immolation] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fanatic Illusion: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fanatic Illusion] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Emphatic Trust: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Emphatic Trust] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fanatic Illusion: Blind Faith
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill range of [Fanatic Illusion] by 2 times, changes the attack cycle by 0.5 seconds

* Damage against Enemy is halved

* Cooldown increases by 5 seconds

attributes.name: Blind Faith: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Blind Faith] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Blind Faith: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Blind Faith] by 1.25% per attribute level
